region_select.title: Select your country
region_select.body: Choose the country your Octopus Energy account is registered in.

account_link.title: Link your account
account_link.body: Click the button below to sign in to your Octopus Energy account and authorize access. Once you have completed authorization, click Continue.

error.authorization_required: Re-authorization required. Please repair the device.
error.rate_limit: Too many requests. Please try again later.
